title: Bengaluru Traffic Advisory April 26: Major Road Closures For TCS World 10K Marathon; Check Routes, Diversions
description: Bengaluru traffic advisory for April 26: Roads near Cubbon Road, Kamaraj Road, and Vidhana Soudha will be closed from 5 AM to 11 AM for the TCS World 10K Marathon. Check full diversions and alternate routes.
